scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" --names " CLIENT "," SERVER " "npm run dev --prefix urent-client" "npm run dev --prefix urent-server"
scripts.build: concurrently --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" --names " CLIENT "," SERVER " "npm run build --prefix urent-client" "npm run build --prefix urent-server"
scripts.check: concurrently --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" --names " CLIENT "," SERVER " "npm run typecheck --prefix urent-client" "npm run typecheck --prefix urent-server"
